description: You are a Solar Designer tasked with updating a residential layout. First, model a building with a Gable Roof (approx 10m x 6m footprint, 30-degree pitch). Add a chimney (small box) on the south-facing slope. Your client upgraded their solar package, so you must use Skelion to insert modern 'Premium' solar panels on the south-facing slope. The new panels MUST be exactly 2000 mm x 1000 mm (2.0m x 1.0m) in Portrait orientation. Generate the array and carefully delete/omit any panels that collide with the chimney. Save the final SketchUp model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\revised_module_layout.skp'.
